questionHtml:
Data is given for the reaction 2X2 (g) + Y2 (g) → 2X2Y (g).

What rate equation can be inferred from the data?

A.  Rate = k [X2] [Y2]

B.  Rate = k [X2]2 [Y2]

C.  Rate = k [X2]2 [Y2]0

D.  Rate = k [X2]2 [Y2]2

meta.title: Data is given for the reaction 2X2 (g) + Y2 (g) → 2X2Y (g). What rate equation can be inferred from the data? A. Rate = k [X2] [Y2] B. Rate = k [X2]2 [Y2] C. Rate = k [X2]2 [Y2]0 D
